title: Buyer asks about the goods receipt status for a PO — PO module queries GR module
user_persona: Buyer checking on goods receipt against an approved PO

conversation.user: Has the goods receipt been done for PO-2026-1200?
Which lines are still pending receipt?
Show me the GR documents themselves.

cross_module_writes.effect: list GR documents linked to PO-2026-1200

must_enumerate_information: list lines with received < ordered (or zero received)
list GR numbers with date, warehouse, line summary
